member.name: M:GTA.World.CreateParticleEffectNonLooped(GTA.ParticleEffectAsset,System.String,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.InvertAxisFlags)
member.summary: Starts a Particle Effect that runs once at a given position then is destroyed.
member.param: The World position where the effect is.
What rotation to apply to the effect.
How much to scale the size of the effect by.
Which axis to flip the effect in.
member.returns:
If the effect was able to start; otherwise,
.
